title: Mika's Moonbeam Adventure
synopsis: When little Mika feels scared at bedtime, she discovers a magical moonbeam that takes her on a gentle adventure through her neighborhood, helping her feel brave and ready for sweet dreams.

pages.text: Mika pulled her soft yellow blanket up to her chin. The room felt dark and scary. She looked out her window at the big, bright moon. "I don't want to go to sleep," she whispered. "The shadows look too scary."

illustration.description: A young South Asian girl with long dark braids sits in a cozy bed with a sunshine-yellow blanket, looking worried. Her bedroom has warm purple walls, a large window showing a full moon, and gentle shadows cast by a night light. Her expression shows concern but not terror.
illustration.alt: Mika sitting in bed looking worried at nighttime

pages.text: Just then, a silvery moonbeam stretched through her window like a gentle slide. It sparkled and shimmered, making everything look magical instead of scary. Mika felt curious and a little brave. "What a pretty light," she said softly.

illustration.description: A brilliant silver moonbeam streams through the window, illuminating Mika's room with soft, magical light. Tiny sparkles dance in the air around the moonbeam. Mika's expression has changed from worried to wonder, her dark eyes wide with curiosity.
illustration.alt: A magical moonbeam shining into Mika's bedroom

pages.text: The moonbeam seemed to whisper, "Come with me, Mika! I'll show you something wonderful." Mika felt excited but still a little nervous. She took a deep breath and touched the moonbeam with her finger. It felt warm and safe.

illustration.description: Mika reaches out tentatively to touch the glowing moonbeam with one finger. Her expression shows mixed emotions - excitement and slight nervousness. The moonbeam glows brighter where she touches it, creating a warm golden light around her small hand.
illustration.alt: Mika reaching out to touch the magical moonbeam

pages.text: Mika slid down the moonbeam like a gentle slide! She floated softly over her neighborhood, seeing her friend Jamal's house with its red door, and Mrs. Chen's garden full of sleeping flowers. Everything looked peaceful and friendly from up high. She felt happy and brave.

illustration.description: Mika glides joyfully down the silver moonbeam over a diverse neighborhood. Below, cozy houses with different colored doors line the street. A garden with drooping nighttime flowers is visible, and everything is bathed in soft moonlight. Mika's expression is pure joy and wonder.
illustration.alt: Mika sliding down a moonbeam over her neighborhood at night

pages.text: The moonbeam carried her past the playground where she played with her friends. Even in the dark, it looked fun and safe. She saw a family of rabbits sleeping under the big oak tree. "Everything looks so peaceful," Mika said, feeling calm and content.

illustration.description: A nighttime view of a playground with swings and a slide, all peaceful in the moonlight. Under a large oak tree, a family of cartoon rabbits sleeps curled up together. Mika floats overhead on the moonbeam, smiling down at the serene scene with a content expression.
illustration.alt: Mika floating over a peaceful playground with sleeping rabbits

pages.text: The moonbeam gently brought Mika back to her bedroom. She felt sleepy and safe now. "Thank you, moonbeam," she yawned. "I'm not scared anymore. I feel brave and ready for sweet dreams." She snuggled into her yellow blanket with a big, happy smile.

illustration.description: Mika is back in her cozy bed, snuggled contentedly under her yellow blanket with a peaceful, sleepy smile. The moonbeam still glows softly through her window, but the room now feels warm and safe rather than scary. Her expression shows complete contentment and drowsiness.
illustration.alt: Mika back in bed feeling safe and sleepy

metadata.illustrationStyle: Bright, cheerful cartoon style with expressive faces. Bold primary colors. Rounded, friendly shapes. Slightly textured backgrounds like construction paper.

questions.question: How did Mika feel at the beginning of the story?
questions.explanation: Mika felt scared when she looked at the dark shadows in her room.

questions.question: What came through Mika's window?
questions.explanation: A silvery moonbeam stretched through her window like a gentle slide.

questions.question: What did Mika see when she floated over her neighborhood?
choices: Her friend's house and sleeping flowers
questions.explanation: Mika saw Jamal's house with its red door and Mrs. Chen's garden full of sleeping flowers.

questions.question: How did Mika feel at the end of the story?
questions.explanation: After her moonbeam adventure, Mika felt brave and ready for sweet dreams.

pages.title: Complete the Story
pages.text: Mika pulled her _____ blanket up to her chin. The moonbeam felt _____ and safe. She felt _____ and ready for sweet dreams.

pages.title: Feeling Words
pages.text: At first, Mika felt _____. Then she felt _____ about the moonbeam. At the end, she felt _____.
